title: jasione foliosa subsp. minuta
intro: Jasione foliosa subsp. minuta, also known as Dwarf Sea Lavender or Dwarf Bluebells, is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Jasione foliosa subsp. minuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
